name: X-Mode (Outlogic)
summary: SDK embedded in apps to harvest MAID+GPS. Sold data to US military and government contractors. Banned by Apple and Google in Dec 2020 after Vice investigation.

name: Cuebiq
summary: Harvests MAID+precise GPS in background. Cuebiq panel reaches 40M+ US devices. Sells movement data to hedge funds (store-visit analytics) and advertisers.

name: Foursquare Pilgrim SDK
summary: Continuously detects venue visits (restaurants, stores, offices) by correlating MAID with GPS. Data sold as foot-traffic intelligence.

name: Kochava
summary: FTC sued Kochava 2022 for selling MAID-linked location data revealing visits to reproductive health clinics, addiction centers, and places of worship.

name: Facebook Audience Network SDK
summary: Transmits MAID from third-party apps back to Meta. Enables cross-app tracking even for non-Facebook users. Participates in RTB auctions, exposing MAID to hundreds of bidders.

name: Google AdMob / Mobile Ads SDK
summary: Most widely deployed advertising SDK. Reads Android GAID (MAID) and IDFA on iOS. Transmits MAID through Google's RTB infrastructure to thousands of buyers.

name: AppLovin MAX
summary: Advertising mediation platform. MAID passed to all integrated demand partners simultaneously during ad auctions, distributing it to dozens of third parties per impression.

name: ironSource (Unity LevelPlay)
summary: Merged with Unity in 2022. MAID shared across Unity's advertising network. Widely embedded in free-to-play mobile games.

name: Reveal Mobile
summary: Transmits MAID+GPS even when OS-level location permission is denied by scanning visible WiFi networks. Documented in AccuWeather case 2017.

name: Arity (Allstate subsidiary)
summary: Embedded in apps to collect MAID + precise driving routes. Data sold to insurers to adjust premiums without users realizing their driving app feeds insurance databases.

name: Adjust
summary: Mobile attribution SDK that reads and stores MAID for install and event attribution. MAID transmitted to Adjust servers and accessible to app developers.

name: Branch
summary: Reads MAID for cross-channel attribution. Uses device fingerprinting as fallback when MAID is unavailable (iOS ATT opt-out).

name: Braze
summary: CRM/marketing SDK that links MAID to user profiles for push notifications and geofencing campaigns. MAID stored in Braze cloud.

name: Amplitude
summary: Product analytics SDK. Does not read MAID by default and uses its own device ID. Generally considered privacy-respecting relative to advertising SDKs.

name: Snap Audience Network SDK
summary: Reads MAID for cross-app ad targeting within Snapchat's audience network. MAID transmitted during RTB auctions.
